title: Pixelbreaker Expansion (Formerly Pixelbreaker Core)
description: An assortment of additions, ranging from nether star armor to eatable bat wings
body:
This version of the Pixelbreaker expansion has been discontinued. It was my first mod, and naturally, got a bit messy. Please head to _[this page](https://modrinth.com/project/pixelbreaker-expansion-2)_ instead!

____

Older Alphas are available on my old _[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pixelbraker-expansion/files/all?page=2&pageSize=20)_ site.

Credit for the Dragon Scales, as well as a bunch of tools goes to Garabash <3

____

Content:

New Ores: Black Diamond [Overworld,Nether,End], Omega [End], Uranium [Overworld], Quartz [Overworld], EXP [Overworld],

Deco Blocks: new Stairs, new Slabs, Marble, Basalt, Sandstone Bricks,

Dungeons&Mobs: Apple Cow, King Zombie, Ice Zombie, Ender Steve, Pigman (Trader), Watchtowers, Shacks, Bats Squids and Llamas droping food, Witherskeletons dropping skull fragments, Rotten Flesh / Bone / ... Blocks,

Armors made of: Dirt, Stone, Quartz, Lapis, Redstone, Obsidian, Emerald, Nether Stars, Dragon Scales,

Tools made of: Obsidian [limited], Emerald, Black Diamonds, Nether Stars,

Storage: Iron Chest, Gold Chest, Diamond Chest, Emerald Chest, Black Diamond Chest [BETA],

Extra Features: 10x Compressed Cobblestone, "fake" Blocks you can walk trough, bread from flour, glass shards if you break glass, Charms (provide potion effects, flying, etc.), randomly harder stone (below 40 in Overworld, allways in Nether), Mobspawner Fragments, Charcoalblock, Bows [BETA], pink-black Error Block, Diamond Apple, killed mobs droppen Hearts (collect to regenerate), Smeltable Diamond / Emerald Armor, Toy Gun, Clay Buckets, growable Mushroom seeds (on dirt), Enchantment Book Pages [BETA], Advanced Bookshelf, Palm Trees [maby delete Blocks]

Craftable Vanilla Stuff: Saddle, Horse Armor, Name Tag, Quartz and Netherwart Block backward crafting, leash, EXP Bottle, Elytra, Chain Armor, Myzel, Enchanted Golden Apple,  and probabbly more...


Languages: English, German (If you want you can transate the Mod into other languages so that I can impliment them)
